features: Clean, soft skin: This body cleanser was created to gently cleanse the skin, removing impurities and dirt without drying it out, leaving skin feeling moisturised, velvety soft and healthy-looking

Nourish and soothe: The moisturising body wash contains Soothing Colloidal Oatmeal and Probiotic Greek Yogurt to care for and cleanse the skin. The body wash features a pleasant Apricot and Honey scent
Suitable for sensitive skin: The body wash for dry skin is suitable for dry, sensitive skin. Its unique formula is soap-free and helps maintain the skin's natural microbiome balance
Application instructions: Massage the Aveeno body cleanser into wet skin and rinse away thoroughly. Complete your routine with Aveeno Daily Moisturising Yogurt Body Cream

Product details: Aveeno Daily Moisturising Yogurt Body Wash (1x 300ml), gentle cleansing body wash with nourishing Colloidal Oatmeal and Probiotic Greek yogurt, daily body wash with Apricot and Honey scent
description: Product Description Aveeno Daily Moisturising Yogurt Body Wash (1x 300ml) — Cleanse your skin, naturally This hydrating body wash from Aveeno was clinically developed to leave your skin with a clean, fresh feeling, nourishing the skin without drying it out. Its unique soap-free formula features Colloidal Oatmeal and Probiotic Greek Yogurt, ingredients chosen to soften and soothe skin, helping to maintain the balance of the skin’s natural microbiome. The skin's moisture barrier is supported, creating a softer, smoother, healthier-looking complexion with a delicious smelling apricot and honey scent. Application instructions: Massage the Aveeno body cleanser into wet skin and rinse away thoroughly. Complete your routine with Aveeno Daily Moisturising Yogurt Body Cream Product Benefits at A Glance Gentle cleansing body wash for dry skin Soap-free cleanser Suitable for dry, sensitive skin Apricot and Honey scent 1x 300ml Ingredients [Pr-017981], Aqua, Glycerin, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Sodium Hydrolyzed Potato Starch Dodecenylsuccinate, Avena Sativa Kernel Flour, Yogurt Powder, Guar Hydroxypropyltrimonium Chloride, Polyquaternium-10, Glycol Distearate, Laureth-4, Acrylates/c10-30 Alkyl Acrylate Crosspolymer, Sodium Chloride, Tetrasodium Glutamate Diacetate, Citric Acid, Sodium Hydroxide, Lactic Acid, Sodium Benzoate, Parfum Safety Warning Aveeno Daily Moisturising Yogurt Body Wash (1x 300ml), Gentle Body Wash with Soothing Colloidal Oatmeal and Probiotic Greek Yogurt, Apricot and Honey Scented Body Cleanser for Sensitive Dry Skin See more
